name: venture-compass
description: Autonomous co-pilot for solo, AI-built micro-ventures. The agent drives the lifecycle: it briefs at session start, watches kill dates / live metrics / the external landscape, and itself decides when to run a decision gate. At each gate it convenes a thorough adversarial consilium of subagent lenses that judge blind and independently, then a synthesizer fuses them into one honest verdict — GO / PIVOT / KILL / SCALE. State persists across sessions in VENTURE.md; default bias is kill on time. Slash commands (/audit /kill /override /details) are manual overrides only — briefing, landscape scans and metric pulls happen automatically.
